beats.speakable_text: If a reread text is familiar, this relationship anxiety pattern needs a better reset.
Trying to outrun relationship anxiety usually makes the loop more expensive. More checking, more testing. And less trust in the evidence you already have.

Relationship anxiety often persists because the attachment system treats ambiguous signals as evidence of danger by default. Pushing harder can look like progress while the underlying pattern stays the same.
Try this. Name the fact you actually have, name the fear you're adding to it. And ask one direct question instead of guessing. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.
Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. One ambiguous signal is not a verdict on the relationship.
